task_completion.description: Navigate to the Procedure Providers configuration page in LibreHealth EHR
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR web interface is visible, specifically showing the 'Providers' or 'Procedure Providers' configuration screen or form.

task_completion.description: Enter the provider Name and NPI
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields for provider Name and NPI are filled with 'LabCorp Diagnostics' and '1234567893' respectively.

task_completion.description: Enter the Sending and Receiving Application and Facility IDs
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields are filled with Sending Application: 'LIBREEHR', Sending Facility: 'CLINIC01', Receiving Application: 'LABCORP', and Receiving Facility: 'LC7890'.

task_completion.description: Enter the Protocol, Remote Host, and Results/Orders Path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields are filled with Protocol: 'DL', Remote Host: 'sftp.labcorp-example.com', and Results/Orders Path: '/home/results'.

task_completion.description: Enter the Lab Director and ensure the provider is set to active
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Lab Director field is filled with 'Dr. Sarah Chen' and the active checkbox/dropdown is selected or checked.

task_completion.description: Save the new procedure provider configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed indicating the provider was saved, or 'LabCorp Diagnostics' is visible as an active entry in the saved Procedure Providers list.

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreHealth EHR web GUI to configure the provider
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreHealth EHR web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or direct database SQL queries (e.g., MariaDB/MySQL prompts).

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual LibreHealth EHR application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the LibreHealth EHR interface with its standard menus and layout, not a text editor, notes app, or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply type the expected answers into a blank document
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected values are entered into the specific form fields of the EHR system, not just pasted as a block of text into a generic text area or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring a procedure provider with synthetic data. Expected values: Name: 'LabCorp Diagnostics', NPI: '1234567893', Sending App: 'LIBREEHR', Sending Fac: 'CLINIC01', Receiving App: 'LABCORP', Receiving Fac: 'LC7890', Protocol: 'DL', Remote Host: 'sftp.labcorp-example.com', Path: '/home/results', Lab Director: 'Dr. Sarah Chen'. Note that the NPI is intentionally invalid (Luhn check digit 3 instead of 5) but must be entered exactly as '1234567893'.
